_rationale: Tree's text formatter is intentionally divergent today (Go uses a compact tree formatter, C++ dumps the response JSON), and the previous descriptor used `Add` against synthetic/multi-lang where state was non-deterministic across runs (the corpus is sometimes indexed by a prior test, sometimes not, swinging exit between 0 and 1). Calling `_NoSuchFunction_` deterministically forces both binaries down the not-found error path: stdout stays empty, stderr carries the (divergent) error message, exit is 1. This locks in the behavior the parity harness can verify without taking on a full text-formatter port (out of scope for parity 4/9 — separate work item should add a `cli.symbols.tree.found` descriptor once C++ ships a tree text formatter).
